title: Easy Wood Cutter 🪚
description: Craft Any Wood Type in The StoneCutter!
body:
![started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9496bd3b8683af5f686b263d826f187c4ce4335e.png)
**Easy Wood Cutter** makes wood crafting much simpler! With this mod, you can use the stonecutter to turn just one wooden plank into any wood variant — stairs, slabs, fences, trapdoors, and more. No need to waste stacks of planks; crafting wood blocks has never been easier!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1576de35359994bd3ee91202445fdcdaaaf81b98.png)
Craft the ( Crafting Planks ) in a crafting table with ( 9 ) sticks
![crafting planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10947f5b5ce80225e8476aa6ab0d3deea0ef743f.png)

Place the ( **Crafting Planks** ) in a stonecutter to craft any wood you wand!

![tab 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f9b467df1d0e17a3881632fcf0255f32effd13a.png)
![tab 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76857f60943f2549708aa5cb70528fec151ff54f.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
